title: Class Pricing Options

fields.label: Trial Lesson Pricing
fields.message:
💰 Trial & Full-term Pricing

Configure pricing options for trial lessons and full-term bookings. The full-term price is set in the Variation settings below.

fields.label: Enable Trial Lesson Option
fields.name: enable_trial
fields.instructions: Allow customers to book a single trial class before committing to a full term. When enabled, the booking form will show both Full-term and Trial options.

fields.label: Trial Price (£)
fields.name: trial_price
fields.instructions: Price for a single trial class (e.g., 10). This will display as '£10 / class' on the booking form.

description: Pricing configuration for trial and full-term bookings on all class products
